rationale: In the citing paper, Van Heerde, Leeflang, and Wittink (2000a) is used mainly as one item in grouped prior evidence that postdeal troughs can occur, and it is also listed in a summary table of earlier adjustment-effects studies. The paper does not build its core VAR/persistence methodology from this specific study, nor does it engage its model or findings in detail. This indicates a background-literature role rather than a distinct functional dependency.
